是咁的，2016年年尾，我因為忽略會員對手機程式o既需求，做o左一個不明智o既決定，加上一直未有好好回應會員平日訴求，最終令唔少會員不滿。事件並唔單單影響我，亦影響一直以來熱愛高登o既每一名網民，為此再向各位表示衷心歉意。

或者有巴打會講，寫好隻app自然會有人回家。我唔否認自己曾經都抱過呢種僥倖心態，但沉思過後，我明白其實只係寫好一隻app並不足夠，要為高登會員做o既事情實在太多，包括提升網速同改善伺服器穩定、維護自由o既討論空間、鼓勵會員參與創作及討論等。因為，高登最珍貴o既係每一位會員，所以落足心力滿足會員訴求係高登o既首要任務。

新app希望係一個好o既開始，為o左令會員能感受我o既誠意，我在此宣佈，使用新app o既會員，登入後將可永久免睇廣告。

當然，新app上架後高登管理團隊唔會因此鬆懈，我o地明白接下來o既日子先係關鍵，要做一個令大家暢所欲言﹑上得自在o既討論區，除o左值得信賴o既團隊，亦十分依賴各位會員積極反映，在此感激每一個o係封測期間為新app回報問題及提出建議o既會員，希望新app上架後各位繼續多加提點。

最後，我想對多年來喜歡過高登o既每一位朋友講：「無盡感激，多謝。」

Manchester City could be without a key man for the Manchester Derby this weekend.

David Silva is rated as doubtful for the trip to Old Trafford to face Manchester United on Sunday (Watch live, 11:30 a.m. ET on NBCSN and online via NBCSports.com) according to his manager Pep Guardiola.

Silva, who scored the winning goal for City against West Ham at the weekend to extend their Premier League winning run to 13-straight games, did not travel with the squad for their UEFA Champions League clash with Shakhtar Donetsk in Ukraine on Wednesday.

Speaking ahead of that game, Guardiola had the following to say.

“David Silva has a little problem – I don’t know whether he will recover for Sunday,” Guardiola said.

If Silva does miss out, it will be a big blow for all-conquering Man City.

The Spanish international leads the Premier League in assists (along with his teammate Kevin De Bruyne) this season with eight so far and he signed a new one-year contract extension last week.

With Paul Pogba suspended for Manchester United for the derby and Silva doubtful, both teams could be without two key players in central midfield.

City have the likes of Bernardo Silva and Fabian Delph who could slot into midfield, while youngster Phil Foden may also be promoted to the bench for the derby.

Guardiola certainly has options if Silva doesn’t make it, but there’s no doubting the diminutive Spaniard has been in sensational form this season for the league leaders and a big reason for their imperious form.

【now.com體育】據權威足球雜誌《法國足球》舉辦的一項虛擬投票，西班牙門將迪基亞的實力在名宿的心目中僅排世界第7位，似乎曼聯領隊摩連奴「高估」了他的愛將。

曼聯的西班牙門將迪基亞（David De Gea）近年一直以「一人救全家」的姿態，多次拯救紅魔於水深火熱之中，像上周作客阿仙奴一役的14次撲救，更可謂這位西班牙國腳的其中一場代表作。雖然曼聯領隊摩連奴賽後開玩笑指迪基亞只是「第3出色」的門將，但原來在一些人心目中，他遠遠不及第3。

《法國足球》日前舉行了一項虛擬投票，由簡尼沙利斯、托度、美亞、舒華沙及歷迪斯5位退役門將，以金球獎的投票方式選出世界最佳門將，結果。不知道迪基亞是否欠缺「觀眾緣」，在今次票選當中只排第7。

獲得第1位的是德國門神紐亞，雖然這位拜仁慕尼黑門神過去多年一直表現出色，即使近兩季不時因傷避戰，但他在很多人心目中的地位依然不變，5名評審的前門將都給他最高分數；第2位就是意大利的保方，這位下月便踏入40歲的老將多年來都深得球迷愛戴，加上退役在即，今次投票名列前茅亦不令人意外。
《法國足球》世界最佳門將選舉結果
排名 門將
1 紐亞（德國/拜仁慕尼黑）
2 保方（意大利/祖雲達斯）
3 泰拔高圖爾斯（比利時/車路士）
4 洛里斯（法國/熱刺）/奧比歷（斯洛文尼亞/馬德里體育會）
6 基羅拿華斯（哥斯達黎加/皇家馬德里）
7 迪基亞（西班牙/曼聯）
8 達史特根（德國/巴塞隆拿）

曼聯名宿史高斯質疑了梳爾的生活健康問題，但是仍然覺得他很強，需要得到更多的比賽機會；謝拉特表示摩連奴不用梳爾有自己的原因，同時也肯定了梳爾的實力，並希望他成為常規主力。


史高斯在BT Sport説：“挺難評價的，因為有很多事情是我們看不到的。我覺得他沒有儘可能保持生活健康。

“從體型上講，他看上去需要每週都踢比賽。我們也有朗尼這樣的球員，一旦有幾場比賽沒有上場，他在場下就不能控制好自己。

“他需要經常踢比賽，包括週末的、週中的比賽。

“梳爾能得到連續的出場機會嗎？我不是很確定。現在的問題是艾殊利楊格在左路打的風生水起。

“我希望他在這裏有未來。幾年以前，我以為我們簽下了世界上最好的左邊後衞。

“他是俱樂部最好的左邊後衞，週末的比賽他不會上場，但是他已經表現出來了他的能力。

“他就像一個飛行器一樣，他對於那個丟球有一點責任，但他依然很強。我找不到另一個能夠像他一樣改變比賽的左邊後衞。”

謝拉特表示，摩連奴不用梳爾肯定有自己的原因，作為英格蘭球迷希望他得到更多機會。

謝拉特説：“我覺得摩連奴這麼做肯定是有原因的，他想激發出梳爾全部的能力。顯然摩連奴對於梳爾不太滿意，可能是體能或者是體型。

“全體英格蘭球迷都希望他能成為常規主力，因為當他發揮出色的時候，他是世界最佳左閘之一。”

Manchester United confident they will land Tottenham left-back Danny Rose for £50m in January or next summer

Jose Mourinho believes Danny Rose will become Manchester United's next first-choice left back in a £50million deal.

The United boss is increasingly confident of landing the England defender next month or during the summer transfer window.

United were keen on the Tottenham player last summer but missed out as he was recovering from a long-term knee injury and Mauricio Pochettino refused to sell two full backs after off-loading Kyle Walker to Manchester City.

Jose Mourinho wants a new left back after relying heavily on veteran Ashley Young this season

However, Rose's position at Spurs has become less certain since the summer. His interview with The Sun newspaper in which he questioned the club's wage structure and admitted that he'd consider a move away is known to have irked the Tottenham hierarchy.

He has also been omitted from match-day squads — including last month's north London derby. Although Pochettino insists he has no problem with the defender, Spurs may be willing to listen to offers for Rose in January or next summer.

United admit that agreeing a deal with Spurs chairman Daniel Levy — a very tough negotiator — will be an arduous task.

Ashley Young, primarily an attacking player, is currently filling the left-back role, while Luke Shaw, a £28million capture from Southampton, is clearly not fancied by Mourinho.

Source: Daily Mail

Manchester United have given Jose Mourinho the green light for important mid-season improvements to a squad competing on four fronts for silverware.

A January transfer budget “in the region of €90million” is an endorsement of the managers achievement in leading United to two major trophies in his first season at the club and United’s strongest start to an English Premier League campaign since Sir Alex Ferguson’s retirement.

///

Mourinho is conscious that Pep Guardiola is pushing City to spend in January on defensive reinforcements with a second bid for Alexis Sanchez also under consideration.

Mourinho has identified three principal weak points in his current squad: left back, winger and central midfield.

No one has managed to consistently hold down a position on the left side of United’s defence since the club lost Patrice Evra to Juventus in 2014; and current first-choice, the 32-year-old Ashley Young, is out of contract at the end of this season.

The group is also short of a specialist winger with pace. Mourinho usually divides starting duties on the left side of his attack between Marcus Rashford and Anthony Martial, both right-footed attackers whose preference is for a more central role. Adding a left-footed wideman would increase the team’s tactical options.

Crystal Palace are mulling over the possibility of ending Timothy Fosu-Mensah’s loan spell early and sending him back to Manchester United, according to reports.

The 19-year-old moved to Selhurst Park on loan over the summer while compatriot Frank De Boer was still in charge, but has fallen out of the reckoning since Roy Hodgson’s arrival.

Although he has made 11 appearances in all competitions for Palace, Fosu-Mensah last got a run out on November 5 – just over a month ago – and only made the bench for their last four matches.

Hodgson must pick between Loftus-Cheek and Fosu-Mensah, and favours the Chelsea man (Getty) And now, according to The Guardian, Palace are considering letting the Dutch defender leave so they can bring in another loan player in the form of Liverpool striker Danny Ings.

Premier League sides are only allowed to name two domestic loanees in their squad, and Palace already have both Fosu-Mensah and Chelsea starlet Ruben Loftus-Cheek.

///

Palace would need to negotiate the early termination of Fosu-Mensah’s loan, though United are likely to accept given the minimal game time the youngster has received recently.

Recent reports suggested the Red Devils were ‘furious’ with Palace about how little he has been used and were preparing to terminating his loan early to find him a club where he would get more first-team exposure.
